element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Tutorial fights against progressively skilled opponents in tournament bracket
Opponent AI demonstration; player learns through observation and experimentation

element_introduction_order.element: Death Match mode arenas with environmental hazards
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Spiked walls, landmines, burning ropes, slick floors require spatial awareness adaptation
Each character has distinct movesets requiring different tactical approaches

typical_tension_triggers: Environmental hazard activation in Death Match
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based match progression with escalating difficulty through tournament bracket structure; Death Match mode introduces sudden environmental stress

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Death Match mode selection - optional hazard-based combat arenas

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tournament opening rounds against basic opponents with limited special move usage
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mid-bracket fighters demonstrate character-specific special moves and tactical patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: Championship opponents with advanced AI execution and frequent special move activation
notable_spikes: Final championship match against strongest AI opponent
Death Match mode hazard timing introduces environmental unpredictability

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear single-elimination tournament structure where player fights sequence of 8-10 opponents, each fight being a self-contained arena with single opponent
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Tournament mode - any match from opening rounds through championship

notable_level_patterns.description: Standard fighting arena augmented with interactive/passive hazards (spiked walls, landmines, burning ropes, slick floors) that create secondary threat layer during combat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Death Match mode - opponent-specific hazard stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Each tournament opponent uses distinct historical/fictional character with unique move palette, requiring tactical adaptation without level geometry changes
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any tournament match - spatial layout consistent, character mechanics varied

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (World Heroes SNES article)
wikipedia - World Heroes series article (gameplay section)
